text:
Beatrice Chebet's wall cabinet is already decorated with medals from World and Cross Country championships. She also has a Diamond League trophy from 2022.But the women's 10,000m World Record-breaker feels her wall cabinet is incomplete without an Olympic medal.Get Full Access for Ksh299/WeekUncover the stories others won’t tell. title: Beatrice Chebet: See you at Paris Olympics
author: Stephen Rutto
description: The 24-year-old star is looking to add an Olympic medal to her already rich catalogue.
